progress_summary: v1.5.0 shipped + live (2026-06-22). The v1.5 GTM/site surfaces all landed and deployed: /ai-recipes (3 multi-skill walkthroughs), /for-agencies, /blog (content collection + index + post route + hand-rolled RSS + 2 launch posts), the footer newsletter panel (→ /api/notify, flag on), the /compare 'Build AI apps' row, /pipeline-builder 'AI app?' branch, and per-skill OG cards for the four AI-native skills (Sprints 4 + deferred tail, PRs #309/#316). Round 6 (the /changelog Option C v2 3-tab layout) also shipped, then was promoted in the v1.5 release cut (PR #311): v1.5 moved to 'Just Released', v1.4.3 demoted, 'Coming Next' → a v1.6 pointer; the e2e spec was updated for the shipped layout. HISTORY: Round 6 (PR open, deploy pending): reworked /changelog from the Option C v3 two-tab layout into Option C v2 — three full-width ARIA tabs (Just Released / Coming Next / Planned) with per-tab colour identity (accent / slate-info / a scoped violet token defined light+dark for AA). Coming Next now leads with just the v1.5 hero; v1.6 roadmap, the v1.7 distribution-theme vote (a live relative bar chart wired to real votes OPC-170/173/174), and an 8-item horizon backlog (OPC-18x) moved into the new Planned tab. Kept the real /api/votes wiring (batched GET + per-click POST + localStorage), the a11y tablist with hidden panels (NOT the preview's CSS slide), 46px vote targets (the preview's tiny backlog buttons would fail WCAG 2.5.8), and deep links (#v1-5 → Coming Next, #v1-6/#v1-7 → Planned, #v1-4 → /coverage). Tab bar deliberately non-sticky — the global Header already is. e2e spec rewritten for the 3-tab DOM; astro check 0 errors, astro build 35 pages, vitest 345/345. Also closed three v1.4.3 single-platform copy stragglers (skills/[id] quick hint + footer CTA, pipeline-builder generated snippet) to mention Codex / the hosted MCP endpoint. Five rounds of UI work merged. Round 1: 5 mobile-demo direction previews → Direction A picked → production MobileWorkbench. Round 2: mobile architecture diagram (vertical stack, no JS, dark default). Round 3: replaced page-summary + OnboardingTour with one-step WelcomePopup, full-bleed workbench, top-right feedback pill, skill detail TOC restyle. Round 4 (PR #213): navigation overhaul — homepage redesign (release double-pill, cinema banner with 12-dot rotator, 4-up resources strip with new Skills tile, phase grid removed), Header restructure into grouped Product/Pipeline/Resources dropdowns, install primary-CTA pill, right-cluster (search input + version chip + feedback text-label + theme), new global ⌘K SearchPalette component. Round 5 (PR #223): /changelog roadmap timeline (vertical Shipped → In progress → Planned → Backlog) backed by a build-time Linear pull (gen-roadmap.mjs filters issues by `roadmap-visible` label), per-item vote buttons (WCAG 2.5.8 compliant 52×48 click targets) with optimistic-update + localStorage mirror, and a Linear-connected feature-request form (title + category + optional email + description) that POSTs to /api/feedback with category to flip the worker into community-submission mode.

progress_table.label: Move desktop feedback pill to top-right
Single-file preview iteration (banner placement A/B/C, menu alt 1/2/3, glow bar, dot indicator variants)
WCAG fixes: target-size (.dot pseudo-element), color-contrast (.rb-tag + .vchip-tag), aria-required-children (dot-row)
Round 6: /changelog → Option C v2 3-tab (Just Released / Coming Next / Planned), v1.7 bar-chart vote + horizon backlog; copy stragglers scrubbed for Codex/MCP

key_decisions: Direction A (Bottom-Tab IDE) selected from 5 previews — preserves IDE metaphor, learnable, all info reachable.
Mobile architecture diagram: static, no JS, dark default, vertical stack of <details> bands. Replaces interactive desktop diagram below 767px.
WelcomePopup: one-step modal with DNS checkbox (localStorage `opchain-demo-welcome-seen`). Auto-opens on every page load unless DNS set. Skipped on mobile.
Desktop full-bleed workbench: dropped page-summary card so the IDE owns the page (78vh height contract retained).
Feedback pill desktop: top-right (top:1rem right:1rem z-index:100). Mobile unchanged — Header.astro already houses the launcher there.

Skill TOC default state uses var(--subtle) (~4.85:1 on obsidian, AA pass) so it blends into bg without failing contrast. Region hover brightens to var(--text); per-link hover overrides to var(--accent). Active-in-viewport entry stays ember.
Click-to-flash uses 320ms scale+nudge bump and 10s linear color fade ember→cream. prefers-reduced-motion disables both.

Round 4: page order on the redesigned homepage is `eyebrow → logo+wordmark → claim → tagline → body → release double-pill → stats → cinema banner → resources strip → intro-actions`. User chose this over a hero-replacement banner so the brand stays primary; release pill + banner pair as a 'what's happening right now' block.
Round 4: cinema banner shorter than the preview (240px min-height vs 540px) and dropped its embedded logo/wordmark since the hero stack handles brand above it.

Round 4: release double-pill uses filled ember for v1.3 (current) and outlined slate (--info #94A3B8) for v1.4 (in progress). The filled/outlined split also gave us ~7:1 contrast on the v1.3 chip (was borderline as outlined-ember at 9.5px bold).

Round 4: search input in the header (Menu Alt 3) replaces the previous chat-bubble feedback button with a 'feedback' text label. The ⌘K palette was built from scratch (no existing palette in the codebase) — single mount in Header, server-renders 14 pages + every skill + 3 actions.

Round 4: WCAG 2.5.8 target-size on the 12-dot indicator solved with a pseudo-element pattern — buttons are 24×24 click targets; the visible 7/14px dot renders via ::before. No overlap. Gap reduced to 0 so adjacent click targets touch edge-to-edge.

Round 4: TypeScript closure-narrowing issue in SearchPalette.astro inline script — `const x = getElementById(...) as T | null; if (!x) ...` doesn't preserve the narrowed type across event-listener arrow callbacks under strict mode. Fixed by re-binding to typed consts (`const scrim: HTMLDivElement = scrimEl as HTMLDivElement`) after the guard.

Round 5: roadmap data layer is build-time-only. `scripts/gen-roadmap.mjs` pulls from Linear's GraphQL endpoint, buckets by issue state (`completed → shipped`, `started → in-progress`, `backlog + milestone → planned`, else `backlog`), and writes `site/src/data/roadmap.json` (gitignored). Graceful degrade: no LINEAR_API_KEY OR fetch error OR zero matches → writes an empty roadmap and exits 0 so Astro builds stay green on contributor machines.

Round 5: `roadmap-types.ts` loads via synchronous `fs.readFileSync` (not `await import('./roadmap.json')`). Reason: CI's site job runs `npm ci && astro check` WITHOUT running the root prebuild, so roadmap.json isn't on disk when TS resolves module paths. The fs read at SSG time returns an empty roadmap on missing-file so type-check passes either way. This bit me on commit 488cada — site/install/build job failed; commit 2091b4a fixed.

Round 5: vote dedup is per-IP per day, server-side, in the existing NOTIFY KV namespace (no new infra). Lock key `vote-lock:<id>:<YYYY-MM-DD>:<sha256(ip)[0:16]>` with 25h TTL. Counter `vote-count:<id>`. The vote button is 52×48px to clear WCAG 2.5.8 target-size without per-element pseudo-element gymnastics this time.

Round 5: community submissions stay HIDDEN from the public roadmap until a team-member adds the `roadmap-visible` label during triage. The form applies only `community-submitted` (when `LINEAR_COMMUNITY_LABEL_ID` is set) and a `[community/feature]` title prefix. Spam-safe by default.
generated_files: previews/preview.html (Round 4 — iteration sandbox; gitignored from build)
user_preferences: Wants HTML previews to evaluate before approving direction (rounds 1 + 4).
Comfortable delegating defaults when no preference ("go ahead and implement option A fully", round 4 feedback button treatment).
Likes brand-on voice and full-bleed/immersive surfaces over heavy chrome.
Round 4: prefers iterating live on the PR branch over local-test-per-commit cadence. Treats LHCI as informational; merges as soon as required checks (build/e2e/worker) clear.

next_actions: No ux-engineer work pending — all v1.5 GTM/site surfaces shipped + live (/ai-recipes, /blog +RSS, /for-agencies, newsletter, /compare AI row, /pipeline-builder AI branch, per-skill OG cards) and the /changelog Option C v2 layout shipped + promoted in the v1.5 release cut.
Open polish backlog (non-blocking): wire the header version chip status-dot to live /api/health; add a /sitemap route (Resources dropdown omits it until it exists).
